name: music-kb
description: Local SQLite music-analysis search for agents, with beginner-friendly natural-language retrieval and read-only MCP tools.

interface.shortDescription: Find songs by natural-language tags in a local, read-only Music Flamingo library.
interface.longDescription: A local-first SQLite knowledge base: publishers create verified snapshots; users can ask for songs by ordinary tag or song language while agents query a read-only local copy through MCP.
defaultPrompt: 找几首带“侧链”或“人声切片”标签的歌，并给我试听链接
找 5 首有气声女声、偏忧郁氛围的歌曲
展示这首歌的完整 Music Flamingo 分析，并说明它为什么匹配
检查本地音乐库是否可用，以及当前查询的是哪个快照
